title: Dentists Google Maps Scraper
description: Scrapes dentists and dental practices from Google Maps with deep enrichment — emails, socials, specialties, payment options, insurances accepted, languages spoken, services list, review sentiment, online-booking / new-patient-promo detection, metro classification, and DSO/practice-type classification.

searchTerms.title: Search terms
searchTerms.description: Dental specialties / search queries (e.g. dentist, orthodontist, oral surgeon, pediatric dentist, cosmetic dentist, dental implants)
searchTerms.sectionDescription: Enter search terms and locations. Each term is combined with each location.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Cities, regions, or countries to search in (e.g. New York, USA or London, UK)

maxResults.title: Max results per search
maxResults.description: Maximum number of practices to scrape in total across all search term + location combinations

minRating.title: Minimum rating filter
minRating.description: Only include practices with this Google rating or above (0 = no filter)

enrichEmails.title: Extract emails
enrichEmails.description: Visit the practice website and extract the best contact email (homepage + /contact fallback). Prefers appointments@ / scheduling@ / frontdesk@ over generic addresses.
enrichEmails.sectionDescription: Each enrichment adds extra data and run time.

enrichSocials.title: Extract social media links
enrichSocials.description: Extract Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and X/Twitter profile links from the practice website

enrichDentist.title: Dentist enrichment
enrichDentist.description: Extract specialties (general / ortho / oral surgeon / endo / perio / pediatric / cosmetic), payment options, insurances accepted (Delta Dental, Aetna, Cigna, etc.), languages spoken, services list, and review sentiment analysis

enrichDentistNiche.title: Niche classification
enrichDentistNiche.description: Detect online booking (NexHealth, Weave, Solutionreach, Calendly), new-patient promos ($99 exam / free X-rays / free consult), metro area, and practice type (solo / group / DSO chain like Aspen Dental, Heartland)

proxyConfig.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfig.description: Residential proxies recommended for high-volume runs to avoid Google Maps blocks
